Attune, Beta Feedback

What did you actually discover?

Your honest feedback shapes everything from here. This takes about 8 minutes. There are no right answers, only useful ones.

Getting started 0%
01, Overall experience
How likely are you to recommend Attune to a couple you know?
0 = not at all likely · 10 = absolutely
Not likelyVery likely
How would you describe the overall experience?
02, The exercise questions
How well did the questions surface things you hadn't already talked about?
Were there questions that felt off, too obvious, too clinical, or missing the point?
0/600
Was there anything you expected to be asked that wasn't?
0/400
03, The results & comparison
When you saw your results side by side, what was your first reaction?
How clear and useful were the results to read?
Did the results lead to a real conversation between you and your partner?
What would have made the results more useful or meaningful?
0/500
04, Ease of use & flow
How easy was it to get started and complete the exercise?
Was there any moment where you nearly gave up or got confused?
0/400
How long did the exercise take you? (approximate)
05, Emotional impact
Did Attune change how you see anything about your relationship?
In your own words, what did you actually learn or notice?
This is the most valuable thing you can share with us.
0/800
How did it feel to answer the questions independently, before seeing your partner's answers?
06, A word from you
If you were telling a friend about Attune, what would you say?
Write it how you'd actually say it, not a review, just what you'd genuinely tell someone.
0/500
May we use your words on our website?
We'll only use first names (or initials if you prefer). You can opt out at any time.

Your responses are confidential and used only to improve Attune.

✦

Thank you, genuinely.

Your feedback is exactly what we need to make Attune better.
We'll be in touch before we launch.
